---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  MKE, Candidate engineer, 2026

2.  MS SPEKTRAL, Candidate engineer, 2025

## Internships

1.  YEO, ERP intern, 2025

2.  TANAP Doğalgaz İletim A.Ş, Procurement & Cost Management intern, 2024

3.  Enerjisa, Project intern, 2024

# Projects

COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF CPM AND PERT LIMITATIONS IN STOCHASTIC PROJECT ENVIRONMENTS USING MONTE CARLO SIMULATION- Graduation Project

Library Occupancy Monitoring System- SQLProject

AuraFY - New Product development project

Yetkin Gençler - Team Leader

# Competencies

MS Project, AutoCAD, Canias, Excel, SQL, R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Lego, Galatasaray, Horror Movies, Weight Lifting\

## My CV

You can download my CV here:

[Download my CV](cv.pdf)
